summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Il Ricettario recipe management app. Backend: 24/24 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All core flows tested and working correctly. Recipe creation, editing, search, folder management, and transcription features all functional.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'
react_native_issues.note: Minor deprecation warning, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Backend properly uses async/await for all DB operations
✓ MongoDB ObjectId excluded from responses (using UUID-based IDs)
✓ Environment variables properly used for URLs and credentials
✓ Frontend uses proper React Native components (View, Text, TouchableOpacity)
✓ All interactive elements have testID attributes for testing
✓ API URL correctly loaded from process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL
✓ Proper error handling with HTTPException and status codes
✓ Background tasks for transcription and video compression
✓ Mobile-first design with proper spacing and touch targets
seed_data_creation: Test data created during testing: TEST_Mario profile, TEST_Tiramisu recipe, TEST_Primi Piatti folder, TEST_Pasta subfolder. All test data properly cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Video extraction and transcription will fail for test URLs (expected - requires real Instagram/Facebook content with accessible videos). The app gracefully handles these failures. EMERGENT_LLM_KEY is configured for Whisper transcription.

backend_endpoints: POST /api/extract - Extract video info (graceful error handling) ✓
POST /api/recipes - Create recipe with manual_caption and notes ✓
frontend_screens: Home tab with search bar and recipe list ✓
Add tab with URL input and extract button ✓
Folders tab with folder list and CRUD actions ✓
Recipe detail page with edit button, notes section, transcription button ✓
Edit recipe modal with name, caption, notes inputs ✓
integration_flows: Recipe creation with manual caption and notes ✓
Recipe search by name, caption, notes ✓
Recipe detail view and back navigation ✓

performance_notes: Backend responds quickly (<200ms for most endpoints). Frontend loads smoothly on mobile viewport. No performance issues detected.
security_notes: No authentication required as per requirements. MongoDB connection secured via environment variables. No sensitive data exposed in responses.

mobile_design_review.touch_targets: Buttons and interactive elements are touch-friendly
mobile_design_review.contrast: Good contrast with white text on dark background (#0f0f0f)
mobile_design_review.components: All React Native components properly used (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, TextInput, ScrollView, SafeAreaView)
mobile_design_review.styling: All styles via StyleSheet.create() - no CSS files
